title: Hardcore Extended
body:
## Description
*This Mod aims to make vanilla Minecraft harder without changing much of the vanilla mechanics. This Mod adds various challanges to make vanilla harder. Examples are: No Damage allowed or no jumping. All of these are able to be turned on and off in the config file. This Mod is under heavy development.*  
These Challanges can all (most) be activated at the same time, but expect an unbeatable Minecraft... (if you beat it, congratulations)

## Credit
This mod was originally published by zOnlyKroks, and I was the head developer of the mod. I asked permission to publish it here too.  
![Discord Messages](https://imgur.com/KRoCDBv.png)

## Features
- Config Item (To change Challenges ingame)
- No Healing Challange
- No Damage Challange
- No Sleep Challange
- No Jumping Challange
- No Block breacking Challange

## Upcoming Features
- Fish Challange (Underwater Challange)
- The Vegan Challenge. (Does what the name says)
- The Vampire Challenge. (Burn in sunlight)

## Contact
Discord 2: https://discord.gg/xccHwNJ9qx
